title: SIP inflows hits record high of ₹32,086 crore in FY26 despite market volatility: RBI FSR | Key takeaways
summary: Despite market volatility, SIP inflows reached a record ₹32,086 crore in March 2026, according to the RBI's Financial Stability Report.&nbsp;

title: How much does it cost to relocate to Hyderabad? Microsoft techie says ₹3.6 lakh
summary: Krish, shared a detailed breakdown of the expenses involved in the move, including rent, security deposit, furniture, appliances and other household essentials.

title: From ₹90,000 salary to ₹15 lakh debt: Viral LinkedIn post explains a financial spiral
summary: A LinkedIn post by SEBI-registered investment advisor Vivek S G (Sulegai), founder of Wealth Crafts, is resonating with users after he shared the story of a Pune professional whose finances unravelled following a family medical emergency, eventually leaving him with a ₹15 lakh debt burden.

title: Interest rate of small savings schemes remains unchanged for July-September quarter — Check latest PPF, SCSS, SSY rates
summary: The government has maintained interest rates on small savings schemes for the July-September 2026 quarter, marking the ninth consecutive quarter of unchanged rates.&nbsp;

title: PFRDA to launch NPS Swasthya with top-up health insurance through insurer tie-ups — here's when it will be live
summary: Health insurance companies will soon offer top-up health cover to National Pension System subscribers via PFRDA's NPS Swasthya product, set to launch in 60-70 days.

title: Alphabet joins Dow Jones, SpaceX enters Nasdaq 100: Which stock should Indian investors choose?
summary: Experts suggest Indian investors can get exposure through international mutual funds, US-focused ETFs, or direct overseas investing under the LRS. While SpaceX's Nasdaq 100 inclusion is expected to attract passive investment flows, experts believe its entry into the Dow remains years away.&nbsp;

title: Is an online will legally valid? Here's what families should know
summary: A will prepared using an online platform is legally valid in India if it meets statutory requirements. But families should ensure it reflects the testator's specific circumstances and assets.

title: Why hybrid SIFs are attracting investors
summary: Hybrid long-short strategies accounted for ₹9,709 crore of investor assets, which was around 70% of the total SIF AUM of ₹13,814 crore

title: Govt extends deadline for filing appeals before GST appellate tribunal — check new due date
summary: The Government has extended the deadline for filing appeals with the GST Appellate Tribunal after stakeholders raised concerns about technical difficulties on the portal. Check new due date here.

title: What are multi-asset allocation funds? Comparing the top 5 funds by portfolio allocation
summary: Multi-asset allocation funds provide diversification by investing across at least three asset classes, helping reduce dependence on any single investment. However, each fund follows a different portfolio allocation strategy, resulting in varying levels of risk and return potential.

title: US Stocks: Oppenheimer makes rare cuts to top US investment banks, backs alternative asset managers
summary: Oppenheimer has downgraded major U.S. investment banks like Goldman Sachs and Morgan Stanley, citing limited upside despite a positive environment. The brokerage advises selling these large-cap banks and instead investing in alternative asset managers, whose shares have seen a significant sell-off.

title: US stocks today: US stocks set for strongest quarter in years as risk appetite holds despite US-Iran war
